site.title: LLM OpenProblems
site.tagline: A rated, taxonomy-organized encyclopedia of open problems in LLM and AI research.

fallbackNotice.untranslated: This page is not yet translated to French; reading the English original.

about.title: About
about.description: Project description, governance, and contact. Phase 1.

watchlist.aria_label: Toggle this problem on your watchlist

rating_challenge.heading: Challenge this rating
rating_challenge.description: Disagree with one of the dimensions? Submit a rationale and the curator team will review your challenge. Your GitHub handle will be displayed publicly alongside your challenge if it reaches a non-rejected status.
rating_challenge.sign_in_prompt: Sign in with GitHub to submit a rating challenge →
rating_challenge.submitted_banner: Your challenge was submitted. The curator team will review it.
rating_challenge.proposed_value_hint: Format depends on the dimension — difficulty uses S/A/B/C/D/E, saturation uses 0-100 or N/A, urgency/value/industry_call use 0-5.
rating_challenge.rationale_placeholder: Why is the current rating wrong? Cite evidence and reasoning.

profile.empty_message: You're not watching any problems yet.
profile.challenges_empty_message: You haven't submitted any rating challenges yet.
profile.challenges_empty_cta: Browse problems to find one whose rating you'd like to challenge →

public_challenges.aria_label: Public rating challenges for this problem
public_challenges.heading: Rating challenges
public_challenges.count_open: {count, plural, =0 {0 pending review} one {1 pending review} other {# pending review}}
public_challenges.count_accepted: {count, plural, =0 {0 accepted} one {1 accepted} other {# accepted}}
public_challenges.page_description: Community-submitted challenges to this problem's current rating. Curators review each challenge; accepted challenges emit a new rating action.
public_challenges.empty_message: No public rating challenges for this problem yet.
public_challenges.empty_cta: Be the first to challenge this rating →

public_profile.not_found_message: No user with that handle exists on LLM OpenProblems.
public_profile.curator_of_record_label: {count, plural, one {Curator of # problem} other {Curator of # problems}}
public_profile.watching_count: {count, plural, =0 {Watching no problems} one {Watching 1 problem} other {Watching # problems}}
public_profile.pending_challenges_count: {count, plural, =0 {0 pending challenges} one {1 pending challenge} other {# pending challenges}}
public_profile.accepted_challenges_count: {count, plural, =0 {0 accepted} one {1 accepted} other {# accepted}}
public_profile.empty_activity_message: @{login} hasn't watched any problems or submitted any challenges yet.

curator.heading: Curator: rating challenges
curator.description: Review community-submitted challenges to existing ratings. Accept to emit a new rating action; reject with notes.
curator.queue_heading: {count, plural, =0 {Pending queue (empty)} one {Pending queue (1 challenge)} other {Pending queue (# challenges)}}
curator.notes_hint: Plain text; up to 4000 characters. Required when accepting or rejecting.
curator.review_error_forbidden: You do not have curator access.
curator.review_error_illegal_transition: This transition is not allowed from the current status.
curator.review_error_coi_blocked: Conflict of interest: you cannot review this challenge.
curator.review_error_notes_accept: Review notes are required when accepting a challenge.
curator.review_error_notes_reject: Review notes are required when rejecting a challenge.
curator.attach_action_description: Commit a new rating-action YAML under content/problems/<slug>/ratings/ via PR, then return here to attach the filename.
curator.attach_action_filename_hint: Form: YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.yaml. The file must already be committed to the repo under content/problems/<slug>/ratings/.
curator.attach_error_forbidden: You do not have curator access.
curator.attach_error_not_accepted: Filename can only be attached after acceptance.
curator.attach_error_invalid_filename: Filename must match YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.yaml and reference a known problem.

home.hero_heading: Rated open problems in LLM & AI research.
home.hero_description: A taxonomy-organized encyclopedia of open problems, scored on five revisable dimensions — Difficulty, Saturation, Urgency, Value, Industry Call — with an immutable rating-action log behind every score.
home.domain_map_switch_aria: Domain map teaser and tabular fallback
home.methodology_description: Every rating traces back to a published, versioned methodology. Five dimensions, one advisory composite, and a strict rating-action log — modeled on how credit rating agencies publish sovereign opinions, adapted for AI research questions.
